nasb.text: You shall make two rings of gold and shall place them on the two ends of the breastpiece, on the edge of it, which is toward the inner side of the ephod.

esv.text: You shall make two rings of gold, and put them at the two ends of the breastpiece, on its inside edge next to the ephod.

cnv.text: 你又要做兩個金環，安在胸牌下邊的兩端，就是靠近以弗得裡面的邊緣上。

ccb.text: 造两个金环，安在胸牌下端靠近以弗得内侧的两边。
